title: UK Space Agency SEAC: Call for Chairperson nomination
body: "The term of the next SEAC Chair will cover a pivotal period as the UK’s ambitions for future space exploration are defined. SEAC has an important role to advise the UK on its strategy and priorities for space exploration, especially ahead of the ESA Council of Ministers in 2025.  Nominations should be made no later than 4pm on 31 May 2025 by email to spaceexploration@ukspaceagency.gov.uk. "
